creator: mazhe@alkumuna.eu
text:
Hello, 

As maintainter, here's another update for dns/mDNSResponder_nss, a bit late because of unrelated issues.

Once again, this is just a version/checksum bump, as main project and APIs remain stable. Here's the usual QA:

dns/mDNSResponder_nss# portlint 
looks fine.

dns/mDNSResponder_nss# make check-plist
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> No pkg-plist issues found (check-plist)

Thanks a lot!
